result.summary: Found 1 major issue: truncated text in the navigation bar that suggests a layout or responsive design problem.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is cut off, showing 'Hot Gam' instead of the complete word (likely 'Hot Games' or similar)
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation container width, reduce font size, or implement proper text truncation with ellipsis to handle the overflow gracefully on smaller viewports
